chat.title: A private council
chat.label: Conversation
chat.subtitle: Ask anything — a calculation, a definition, a deep strategy review. PETER picks the right model in milliseconds.
chat.suggest1: What time is it in Tokyo?
chat.suggest2: Analyze the strategic risk of expanding into Europe in 2026.
chat.suggest3: Define the difference between strategy and tactics — in two lines.
chat.didYouMean: Looks like you're writing in {{lang}} — switch the UI?
chat.translatorHint: Open in your current UI language.

cost.label: Cost & Usage
cost.title: The savings
cost.ifPremium: If we'd run every query on Claude Opus
cost.noQueriesYet: No queries yet. Visit the chat to begin.
cost.sparklineHint: Tiny gold lines per tier. Workspace-aware.

settings.label: Settings
settings.title: Tune the strategist
settings.languageHint: Translates the UI. PETER auto-detects the language you use in chat and replies in kind.

home.label: Command
home.title: Intelligence,
home.subtitle: The strategist's command center. Intelligent routing across four model tiers, a seven-agent build crew, and long-form memory — all under one quiet roof.

router.label: AI Router
router.title: Cheapest capable
router.subtitle: Pattern + heuristic classifier picks one of four tiers in milliseconds — no LLM call to route. Click any tier to inspect the model behind it.

crew.label: CrewAI App Builder
crew.title: Seven minds,
crew.subtitle: Describe what you want built. Architect, DBA, Backend, Frontend, QA, DevOps and Documenter take the brief in sequence — each on the cheapest capable model.
crew.placeholder: e.g. A subscription-based AI note-taking app for legal teams with audit logs.

memory.label: Strategist Memory
memory.title: What PETER
memory.subtitle: ChromaDB-backed vector recall across every conversation. Search semantically, teach PETER directly, or let extraction work in the background.
memory.recallPlaceholder: Semantic recall — e.g. 'what is the user building?'

workspaces.label: Project Workspaces
workspaces.title: Portfolio of
workspaces.subtitle: Each workspace gets its own memory, sessions and crew runs. Switch contexts the way a strategist switches cabinets — cleanly, instantly.

studio.label: Script Studio
studio.title: Where words
studio.subtitle: Generate a short-form video script, score its quality on five dimensions, then let PETER produce three improved variants. Or run the self-improving genius-prompt loop to evolve a prompt that consistently produces 8+ scripts.
studio.noSavedPrompts: No genius prompts yet. Run the loop above to create one.
studio.crewHintBelow8: Score 8+ unlocks production-grade hand-off. Below 8 still works — Crew will build the production checklist regardless.
studio.timingHintStreaming: Streaming · iter ≈ 30s each · proxy cap bypassed
